pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-004 (Data Quality/Skill) scores 0.441 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.441) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA addresses data quality enforcement and validation — a primary IC-level data engineering responsibility. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DDaT signal (0.441), and Data Quality handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does DDaT signal (0.441) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual Data Engineer hiring requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 60-85% of senior Data Engineer job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at IC-to-senior IC level across major platforms.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.441 is market-validated for Data Engineer IC/senior IC. Final decision: include.
